query:
SELECT 
  YEAR(saleDate) as ano,
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas,
  SUM(saleValue) as valor_total,
  SUM(totalCommission) as comissao_total,
  AVG(saleValue) as ticket_medio
FROM sales
WHERE YEAR(saleDate) IN (2024, 2025, 2026)
GROUP BY YEAR(saleDate)
ORDER BY ano;
